channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Trees are totally overgrown on footpath, 16th March
item.description:
Footpath is blocked by overhanging trees
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter down length of combermere rd, 16th March
item.description:
Uber drivers and food delivery drivers park on Combermere rd and throw rubbish on the street. Litter dropped daily by children and parents going to Stockwell Primary School and Lansdowne School which are off Combermere Rd. Current cleaning schedule is inadequate. Requires daily litter picking. Reported multiple times to Streetcare every week but problem is getting worse rather than better. Unclear if litter pickers are picking up litter on this stretch of road. Please advise how to get more regular litter picking on the street which is urgently needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of potholes centre and side ofvroad, 16th March
item.description:
Lots of potholes between the Beaver wood and Thompson's garden centre that side and centre of road some with loose chippings Very dangerous for bikes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smelly rubbish, 16th March
item.description:
The two pictures show the metal bin area which is constantly full of smelly rubbish which is never removed. Also a lot of bin bags are piled on the top. Can this be completely cleaned out please and disinfected.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dismantled shed dumped on Millpond Estate, 16th March
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gas cannister has been dumped, 16th March
item.description:
There is a nitrous oxide cannister been dumped outside 26/28 pickhurst mead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Mead, Hayes, Greater London

item.title: Builder’s skip dumped on roadside, 16th March
item.description:
Builder’s skip dumped on roadside.

item.title: Multiple potholes on roundabout, 16th March
item.description:
Numerous deep potholes over and around the roundabout, making a busy and tricky roundabout even more difficult to negotiate
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ryecroft Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned garden chair, 16th March
item.description:
It’s just been left there. My neighbours mentioned this to me as I was away, but I understand it’s been there for two days. Near the junction of Priory Park and Lee Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lee Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, broken wood on the road for months, 16th March
item.description:
Unfortunately there has been litter, wood at the side of the road since Christmas. I'm concerned the weekly schedule is not happening, with the default note "This issue will be resolved during the next, scheduled, weekly cleanse." often being replied. This junction from Greenwich High Road, to outside Valegro house and the turning to Lovibond lane is always in a really poor visual condition, lots of litter, waste all over the edge of the road and pavements.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain needs clearing out, 16th March
item.description:
Water cannot drain away, needs clearing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brackendale Court, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped again, 16th March
item.description:
Outside 185 Leesons Hill, Rubbish has been dumped here AGAIN it has been there a few days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 142, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large hole in road, 16th March
item.description:
This is getting larger by the day and becoming dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London

item.title: Fridge freezer dumped on verge, 16th March
item.description:
Dumped recently, just needs removing. On grass verge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped - Alleyway 84, 16th March
item.description:
As per photo please can the rubbish be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lenor Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Christmas tree on verge, 16th March
item.description:
Been there a week or so, just needs removing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot holes in road and number of heavy duty construction vehicles (including cranes) on a residential road.), 16th March
item.description:
For the past 10 years, Southill Road has had to endure continual building work on ‘luxury’ flats by the railway bridge. I would like to understand what due diligence the council undertakes on how long a project will take, whether the builders have the money to complete it and what impact will be made on the local community. We all pay a significant amount in Council Tax here. What is being done to ensure that everyone is taken into consideration when allowing this type of work to take place? The private part of the road is shocking with huge dangerous potholes, and the council maintained part is heading the same way; which is what happens when 300 odd tipper trucks and huge cranes (the size you see in the city) get driven down it on a regular basis.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southill Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th March
item.description:
Two shopping trolleys full of gas canisters since New Year’s Eve. And other junk. Black bags and sofa pillows large ones. I’m ts a mess and need clearing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park View Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tip, 16th March
item.description:
Large fly tip next to bin blocking path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harry Zeital Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every week the occupier is leaving rubbish on pavement, 16th March
item.description:
The skip smells and iv seen rats. Been here since 2019. Rubbish from occupier is strew on pavement. I am disabled and its not only unsightly but dangerous.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arsenal Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
